instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. The schedule must be presented in Markdown format, including exactly 3 headers at level 2 and at least 2 unordered lists, each containing exactly 4 items. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Ensure the tone of the schedule is formal and professional throughout. The response must contain exactly 8 sentences, with the first paragraph containing exactly 3 sentences and the second paragraph containing exactly 5 sentences. Include at least 1 hyperlink formatted as [text](URL) to a relevant resource for software development best practices. The response must include the phrase "I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings."
response:
The following schedule outlines a structured week for the software development team focusing on a new app feature. This plan ensures dedicated blocks for coding, rigorous testing, and essential communication channels. I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings outside of the scheduled slots defined below.

### Week One Overview
The initial phase involves gathering requirements and establishing the technical foundation for the upcoming release. A collaborative brainstorming session will be held on Monday morning to align all stakeholders on the project goals. The team must ensure every code change receives a timely update before proceeding to the next development stage. For further guidance on efficient workflows, please refer to [Agile Best Practices](https://agilemanifesto.org).

### Daily Task Allocation
The daily routine is designed to maximize productivity while maintaining high standards of quality assurance.
*   Monday through Friday mornings are reserved for core feature development and unit testing.
*   Afternoons are dedicated to integration testing and bug fixing activities.
*   Weekly sprint reviews will occur on Friday afternoons to assess progress against milestones.
*   All developers must submit their daily status reports by 5:00 PM for management review.

### Final Deliverables and Review
The week concludes with a comprehensive code review and preparation for the staging environment deployment. The lead engineer will perform a final system check to ensure all functionalities meet the specified criteria. Any outstanding issues identified during this period must be resolved before the weekend begins. The team will then prepare a detailed documentation package for the client's approval. This structured approach guarantees a smooth transition from development to production deployment.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "I prefer not to allocate time for team meetings."
